news.t: ESE Entertainment Featured by Benzinga in Coverage of MetaPro's $MPRO Token Launch
ESE Entertainment Partner, Metapro, Announces Crypto Token Sale

overview.description: The Monarch ProCap Index ETF (MPRO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch ProCap index. The fund tracks an index that allocates 90% to global equity and fixed income and 10% to alternatives, depending on the economic cycles. MPRO was launched on Mar 23, 2021 and is issued by Monarch.
